data.title: Dune: Part Two
data.synopsis: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future.

reviews.title: A masterpiece
reviews.body: Visually stunning and emotionally gripping. Worth every ringgit on the big screen.

reviews.title: Better than Part One
reviews.body: The pacing and the worm-riding scene gave me chills. See it in IMAX if you can.
